goal: Add a side-effect-free request-packet builder for cockpit patch permit issuance readiness while keeping permit issuance, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, renderer changes, runtime, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not issue permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, change renderer files, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Cockpit permit issuance readiness can be converted into a request packet without issuing a permit.
Request and requester refs are required.
assumptions: Actual authority review and permit issuance require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing request ref, and blocked readiness cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit issuance, server mutation, route mutation, renderer mutation, executable actions, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-091 classified cockpit patch permit issuance readiness without issuing a permit.
